author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Gate: do NOT start this migration until the hub_v3 dual-write soak from PR2 (GH PR #632) is clean -- enable with: crosslink config set hub_v3.dual_write true, monitor with: crosslink integrity hubv3 (want sustained PASS with mirror_failures=0 and push_failures=0 in .crosslink/hub-v3-shadow-stats.json over days of normal use).
